Uses of Package
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.extension.api

  • Packages that use de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.extension.api 
    Package Description
    de.uka.ilkd.key.gui
    This package contains classes forming the graphical user interface of KeY.
    de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.docking  
    de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.extension.api  
    de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.extension.impl  
    de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.nodeviews  
    de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.originlabels  
    de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.prooftree  
    de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.testgen
    This package contains the graphical user interface of the test generation backend.
    org.key_project.exploration  
    org.key_project.exploration.ui  
    org.key_project.ui.interactionlog  
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.extension.api used by de.uka.ilkd.key.gui 
    Class and Description
    KeYGuiExtension
    A marker interface for extension of the KeY GUI.
    KeYGuiExtension.Info 
    KeYGuiExtension.LeftPanel
    This interface describes the UI extension point on the left bottom corner (JTabbedPane).
    TabPanel 
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.extension.api used by de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.docking 
    Class and Description
    KeYGuiExtension
    A marker interface for extension of the KeY GUI.
    KeYGuiExtension.Info 
    KeYGuiExtension.MainMenu
    Main Menu extension provides entry to the extension JMenu in the main frame.
    KeYGuiExtension.Startup
    Simplest extension point.
    KeYGuiExtension.Toolbar
    This interface describes the UI extension to add a KeYGuiExtension.Toolbar into the main window.
    TabPanel 
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.extension.api used by de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.extension.api 
    Class and Description
    ContextMenuKind 
    DefaultContextMenuKind 
    KeYGuiExtension.ContextMenu
    This interface describes the UI extension for adding various context menus.
    KeYGuiExtension.KeyboardShortcuts
    Extension Point for defining keyboard shortcuts for various components.
    KeYGuiExtension.Toolbar
    This interface describes the UI extension to add a KeYGuiExtension.Toolbar into the main window.
    TabPanel 
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.extension.api used by de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.extension.impl 
    Class and Description
    ContextMenuKind 
    KeYGuiExtension
    A marker interface for extension of the KeY GUI.
    KeYGuiExtension.ContextMenu
    This interface describes the UI extension for adding various context menus.
    KeYGuiExtension.Info 
    KeYGuiExtension.KeyboardShortcuts
    Extension Point for defining keyboard shortcuts for various components.
    KeYGuiExtension.LeftPanel
    This interface describes the UI extension point on the left bottom corner (JTabbedPane).
    KeYGuiExtension.MainMenu
    Main Menu extension provides entry to the extension JMenu in the main frame.
    KeYGuiExtension.Settings
    This interface describes the UI extension to add a SettingsProvider into the default settings dialog.
    KeYGuiExtension.Startup
    Simplest extension point.
    KeYGuiExtension.StatusLine
    This interface describes the UI extension to add a components into the status line (right side) of the main window.
    KeYGuiExtension.Toolbar
    This interface describes the UI extension to add a KeYGuiExtension.Toolbar into the main window.
    KeYGuiExtension.Tooltip
    Extension interface for the tooltips in the sequent view.
    TabPanel
